response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content. Identified the visual as a static anime-style wallpaper loop with no moving parts. 2. Listened to the audio, which consists of ambient, atmospheric music. 3. Confirmed there are no vocals in the track. 4. Concluded that no vocal music is present and no song metadata can be identified.
response.global_summary: A static anime-style wallpaper loop featuring a character with a red umbrella standing in a misty forest path before a torii gate. The video contains atmospheric ambient music but no vocal tracks.

scenes.description: A static anime-style illustration of a girl holding a red umbrella, standing in a misty, dark forest setting with an old torii gate in the background. Ambient music plays, but there are no vocals.
